nodes.title: List Asana Tasks
nodes.description: GET /api/integrations/asana/tasks with {workspaceId, projectId}. Returns array of {gid, name, completed, due_on, assignee}. Uses ASANA_TOKEN environment variable.

nodes.title: Create Asana Task
nodes.description: POST /api/integrations/asana/tasks with {name, projectId, assignee, dueDate}. Creates task in Asana. Returns {gid, name, permalink_url}.

nodes.title: List Notion Tasks
nodes.description: GET /api/integrations/notion/tasks with {databaseId}. Returns array of {id, title, status, assignee, dueDate} from Notion database. Uses NOTION_TOKEN.

nodes.title: Create Notion Task
nodes.description: POST /api/integrations/notion/tasks with {title, status, databaseId}. Creates page in Notion database. Returns {id, url}.

nodes.title: List ClickUp Tasks
nodes.description: GET /api/integrations/clickup/tasks with {listId}. Returns array of {id, name, status, assignee, due_date}. Uses CLICKUP_TOKEN.

nodes.title: Create ClickUp Task
nodes.description: POST /api/integrations/clickup/tasks with {name, listId, assignee}. Creates task in ClickUp. Returns {id, url}.

nodes.title: List Airtable Records
nodes.description: GET /api/integrations/airtable/records with {baseId, tableId}. Returns array of {id, fields} from Airtable. Uses AIRTABLE_TOKEN.

nodes.title: Create Airtable Record
nodes.description: POST /api/integrations/airtable/records with {baseId, tableId, fields}. Creates record in Airtable. Returns {id, createdTime}.

nodes.title: List Linear Issues
nodes.description: GET /api/integrations/linear/issues with {teamId}. Returns array of {id, title, state, assignee, dueDate}. Uses LINEAR_TOKEN.

nodes.title: Create Linear Issue
nodes.description: POST /api/integrations/linear/issues with {title, teamId, assignee}. Creates issue in Linear. Returns {id, url}.

nodes.title: Link Task To Agent
nodes.description: POST /api/integrations/tasks/:id/link with {agentId, branchName}. Updates task with agent branch reference. Shows in task description or custom field.
